# Adeel Atta - Full Profile

## Personal Information

- **Title:** Software Engineer
- **Email:** adeelatta2000@gmail.com

## Education
**BSE in Software Engineering** - University of Sindh (Jan 2020 – May 2024)
- CGPA: 3.71 / 4.00
- Coursework: Software Engineering, Data Science, Machine Learning, Computer Networks, Information Security, Web Engineering, Mobile App Development, Data Warehousing, Software Quality Assurance, Design & Analysis of Algorithms

## Awards & Honors
- **Gold Medal** - Awarded for securing 1st position in Software Engineering at the University of Sindh
- **Silver Medal** - Awarded for securing 2nd position in the Faculty of Engineering and Technology at the University of Sindh
- **Prime Minister Laptop Award** - Recipient of the Prime Minister Laptop Award during undergraduate studies

## International Competitions & Hackathons
1. **Geekle AI Hackathon** (Team FR1) - 9 members - link
2. **Meta Hacker Cup 2024** - Ranked 6,752 out of 30,000+ global participants
3. **Harvard CS50 Puzzle Day** (Team CS50 Puzzle Squad) - 4 members
4. **Visionary Award - LLM Hackathon (Materials Science)** (Team Best Team) - 10 members - Built a RAG-powered system for extracting structured data from scientific papers
5. **Llama 3 Hackathon** (Team Fastian) - 4 members - Built an LLM-as-a-judge chat evaluation tool using the Llama 3 model
6. **Pak-Angels Gen AI Hackathon** (Team Smart Solution) - 5 members - Developed AI-powered Environmental & Urban Metrics Tool leveraging NASA POWER data and GPT-4
7. **WordPress Plugin Hackathon** - Contributed to programmatic plugin feature development

## Teaching & Mentoring
- **Stanford Code in Place** - Section Leader (Apr 2026 – present)
- **ICodeGuru** - Moderator & Trainer (May 2023 – present)

## Professional Experience
- **React.js Developer** at TABS Technology (Sep 2024 – Jan 2025) - Built and maintained 6+ web applications using React, TypeScript, and Node.js
- **AI Chatbot Developer** at Cents的事件 (Remote, Pakistan) (Jul 2022 – Nov 2022) - Configured workflow automation and integrated LLMs for customer service

## Technical Skills
- **AI & Machine Learning:** Python (Pandas, NumPy), PyTorch, Scikit-learn, HuggingFace, RAG, LLM Engineering, ML Model Training, Deep Learning
- **Software Engineering:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Git, Docker, JEST, Playwright, BDD / Cucumber
- **Blockchain & Web3:** Cosmos SDK, Solana, Web3.js, Ethers.js, WalletConnect, MetaMask, EVM, Staking Platforms

## Projects
- **Personify AI** - AI chat assistant Chrome extension - https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/personify-ai-chat-assista/dfokiabcgalihnedbbjbkdfhjeokdpne
- **EthicalNode Platform** - Maintained distributed staking network for 900+ edge nodes with $1M+ on-chain capital - https://ethicalnode.com
- **Ethical Wallet** - Chrome extension wallet for secure browser-based blockchain transactions - https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ethical-wallet/nfaepmamdapehcbedhejbjcpnlcldodi
- **Decentr.ai** - MERN-stack multi-model AI aggregation hub & API gateway
- **Environmental & Urban Metrics Modeling Tool** - Analytical pipeline for NASA POWER meteorological data - https://urban-ai.streamlit.app/
- **P2P File Sharing with Blockchain** - Decentralized file sharing using WebRTC, IPFS, and Ethereum smart contracts - https://p2pblockshare.vercel.app/
- **YouTube Comment Analyzer** - ML-powered toxicity and spam detection with Streamlit - https://ytcommentanalyzer.streamlit.app/
- **E-Learning Platform with AI** - AI-powered educational platform with content recommendations

## Site Structure
Single-page application with 3 tabs:
1. **Introduction** - Bio, Education, Awards & Honors, International Competitions & Hackathons
2. **Teaching & Mentor** - Teaching positions and mentoring experience
3. **Experience** - Professional Experience, Technical Skills, Projects
